Class mysqlParser.Generic_typeContext

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.RuleContext
org.antlr.v4.runtime.ParserRuleContext
com.zendesk.maxwell.schema.ddl.mysqlParser.Generic_typeContext
